product_name: Dragon Stars Series - Dragon Ball Super - Super Saiyan Blue Goku, Power Up Pack 6.5" Action Figure Set

bullets: The Dragon Stars Power Up Pack captures the most epic moments of the Dragon Ball Universe. Recreate your favorite scene or make up one of your own
This highly sought after collection lets you step into the world of Dragon Ball with Super Saiyan Blue Goku where your imagination can be the star of the action
Each figure comes with its own unique power up accessories that lets you control the action like never before
Collectible packaging is the perfect way to show your love for Dragon Ball. Re-create your favorite action packed moments with 3 accessories to choose from
20+ points of articulation with the Dragon Stars figures you know and love! For ages 4 and up
content.description: It's time to power up your Dragon Ball Super collection! Bandai’s Dragon Stars Power Up Pack now lets you step into the anime world of Dragon Ball Super where your imagination can be the star of the action. Re-create your favorite action-packed moments with powered-up accessories. Each figure comes with its own unique power up accessories, 20+ points of articulation, and collectible packaging. Recreate your favorite scene or make up one of your own, this figure is perfect for play and display. For ages 4 and up.

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.

_meta.source_file: New Item Setup Sheet 6.22.26 Bandai Batch 1.xlsx
